chunks.text: 1 ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Constitution Petition No. D- 71 of 2023 (Qutub Ali Shah vs. P.O Sindh and others) DATE OF HEARING ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE Present; Irshad Ali Shah, J Zulfiqar Ali Sangi, J Hearing of case For hearing of main case 13-03-2024 Syed Tanveer Abbas Shah, Advocate for the Petitioner Mr. Ghulam Abbas Kuber, Assistant Advocate General Sindh >>>>>>..<<<<<< The petitioner by way of instant petition has sought for directions against the respondents to release his pensionery benefits, same as per statement filed on behalf of Deputy Inspector General of Police Sukkur Range have already been released in his favour. When confronted with such statement, it is stated by learned counsel for the petitioner that it is not in accordance with the pay slip of the petitioner. If it is so then it involves a factual controversy same could not be resolved by this Court in exercise of its Constitutional jurisdiction. Consequently, the instant Constitutional Petition is dismissed. Judge Judge ARBROHI
